login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your email and password to access your account

errors.accessDenied: No account found for this email. Please register your organization first.
errors.oauthLinked: This email is already associated with a different sign-in method.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create your organization
register.description: Set up your company account and start running better 1:1s
register.passwordHelp: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number
register.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.successDesc: If an account with that email exists, we sent a password reset link. Check your inbox and spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.passwordHelp: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number
resetPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent you a verification link. Click the link in your email to verify your account.
verifyEmail.successDesc: Your email has been verified successfully. You can now access all features.

invite.title: Join {organization}
invite.description: Set up your account to get started
invite.invalidDesc: This invitation link is not valid. It may have been used already or the URL may be incorrect. Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.
invite.usedDesc: This invitation has already been accepted. If you already have an account, you can sign in.
invite.expiredDesc: This invitation has expired. Please contact your administrator to request a new invitation.
invite.passwordHelp: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number
invite.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verificationBanner.message: Please verify your email address. Check your inbox for a verification link.
